moments.author: Dan Loeb
moments.why: The hedge‑fund billionaire’s one-word tweet reignited crypto‑market speculation amid a pullback in AI‑momentum stocks.

moments.author: Donald J. Trump
moments.quote: Ridiculous for the U.S.A. to continue along this one sided path when the relationship is not reciprocal. They were not there for us!!!
moments.why: Trump’s statement criticizing NATO burden‑sharing sparked market chatter tied to defense contractors.

moments.author: Sam Altman
moments.quote: Proposed giving the U.S. government a 5% stake to share AI’s benefits via a sovereign‑style fund
moments.why: A striking move signaling AI firms may align more directly with public interest and political oversight.
